tools.name: structured_response
tools.description: Return structured analysis with summary, key_points, sentiment

messages.content: Analyze in one sentence: AI is transforming healthcare. Return structured analysis.

input.summary: AI is transforming healthcare by revolutionizing diagnostics, treatment, and patient care delivery.
key_points: AI is driving significant changes in the healthcare industry
Transformation impacts multiple areas including diagnostics and treatment
Healthcare delivery and patient care are being modernized through AI technology

parsed_structured.summary: AI is transforming healthcare by revolutionizing diagnostics, treatment, and patient care delivery.
key_points: AI is driving significant changes in the healthcare industry
Transformation impacts multiple areas including diagnostics and treatment
Healthcare delivery and patient care are being modernized through AI technology

key_observations.native_structured_output: No; use tool_choice to force tool_use with schema
key_observations.validation: input_schema constrains tool_use input; no separate validation step

differences: Anthropic: tool-as-structured-output; OpenAI: native parse() with schema
mapping_to_current_system.conversion_needed: For parse()-like use: create synthetic tool, tool_choice that tool, then read tool_use.input.
